subcodes.first_line: O ye two handmaidens of the glorious Lord! Grieve not at your separation from Isma'il, neither let sorrow overtake you, nor gloom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز خداوند عزیز از فرقت جناب اسمعیل حرقت نجواید و حسرت ننمااید و کدورت
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
